SPESTG-480 DIA exception handling and traceability updates

Implemented and validated DIA exception-handling updates for SPESTG-480, including improved App Insights traceability, FailureType logging, invalid encrypted/decrypted file handling, and Dataverse staging retry exhaustion handling.

Validation completed in Dev using timer-triggered DIA ingestion flow, Blob input, QA-aligned sample file, App Insights logs, and Dataverse staging runtime dependency.

Note:
Req 43-47 require outbound email notification. Current implementation logs the notification-required path with mapped recipient/team details. During validation, no existing outbound email sender or SMTP/mail configuration was found in the current repo or Dev Function App settings. A separate draft branch has been created to prepare possible SMTP wiring pending confirmation of the approved project email/notification mechanism.
